title: Multi-Purpose Compost 20 Litre
features: Compost is produced from high-quality peats
With the addition of a superb and proven fertiliser
With a nutrient enhanced formula and wetting agent ideal for general garden use
Helps promote strong, healthy, longer lasting plants
description: Product Description Growmoor Multipurpose Compost is produced from high quality peats with the addition of a superb and proven fertiliser. It is a consistent, high grade, quality compost with a nutrient enhanced formula and wetting agent ideal for general garden use, including containers, pots, and hanging baskets. This product helps promote strong, healthy, longer lasting plants. Comes in a 20 litre bag. Safety Warning May contain chemicals harmful if swallowed or absorbed through skin. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Do not use near food or feed areas. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice immediately and show the container or label. Dispose of container in accordance with local regulations.
